summary: Completed comprehensive testing of restaurant menu booking platform integration. Backend APIs working correctly with 94.4% success rate. Frontend restaurant menu page loads and displays properly when authenticated, with all core functionality implemented including menu display, cart management, promo codes, and order placement.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 403 'Not authenticated' for customer orders endpoint
minor_bugs.impact: General orders endpoint has auth issue, but restaurant-specific orders work fine

authentication_issues.issue: Session timeout causes redirect to login page during extended testing

passed_tests: GET /api/restaurants/{id} returns restaurant details with mock data
POST /api/restaurants/{id}/orders creates orders successfully (order number: REST-000002)
Restaurant menu page loads with correct header (La Belle Époque, Yaoundé, 4.7 rating)
Menu items display with names, descriptions, prices in FCFA format
Menu category tabs (All, Starters, Mains, Desserts, Drinks, Specials) present
Add to cart buttons functional on menu items
Cart panel displays items and calculations
Reservation details form (date, time, guests, special requests) present
Place Order button implemented with total display
User authentication and login flow working
Navigation to restaurant menu page successful after login
